entry.title: What is TAANA in SAP?
entry.content:
TAANA Transaction vs. SE16N: A Comparative Analysis

Understanding TAANA and SE16N

TAANA and SE16N are two commonly used transactions in SAP for data maintenance and analysis. While they share the same underlying purpose of providing a platform for data access and manipulation, they cater to different use cases and offer distinct functionalities.

TAANA: A Transaction for Table Maintenance

  • Purpose: Primarily designed for maintaining data in custom or standard tables.
  • Functionality: Offers a user-friendly interface with fields and buttons for creating, editing, and deleting table entries.
  • Features:
    • Field help and description for better understanding of data elements.
    • Checkboxes for mandatory fields and validation rules.
    • Option to display table entries in a list view.

SE16N: A General Data Browser

  • Purpose: A versatile tool for browsing and analyzing data from various SAP objects, including tables, views, and data clusters.
  • Functionality: Provides a more flexible approach to data exploration, allowing users to define selection criteria and perform data manipulations.
  • Features:
    • Advanced search options and filters.
    • Ability to export data to various formats (e.g., Excel, CSV).
    • Integration with other SAP tools like ABAP debugger.

Key Differences

Feature TAANA SE16N
Primary PurposeTable maintenanceData browsing and analysis
InterfaceUser-friendly, field-basedMore flexible, selection-based
FunctionalityCreate, edit, delete table entriesExplore data from various objects
FeaturesMandatory fields, validationAdvanced search, data export
Export to Sheets

When to Use Which

  • TAANA: Use TAANA when you need to directly modify data in a specific table, especially for routine maintenance tasks.
  • SE16N: Choose SE16N when you want to explore data from multiple sources, analyze trends, or perform more complex data manipulations.

Running TAANA in SAP: A Step-by-Step Guide

TAANA is a transaction code in SAP used for maintaining data in custom or standard tables. Here's a step-by-step guide on how to run TAANA:

1. Access the SAP System

  • Log into your SAP system using your credentials.

2. Enter TAANA

  • In the SAP Easy Access menu, navigate to the Transaction field.
  • Enter TAANA and press Enter.

3. Select the Table

  • In the Table Name field, enter the name of the table you want to maintain. For example, if you want to maintain data in the MARA table (material master), enter MARA.
  • Press Enter.

4. Choose Maintenance Mode

  • You'll be presented with options for maintenance mode:
    • Display: View table entries without editing.
    • Change: Edit existing table entries.
    • Create: Add new table entries.
    • Delete: Remove existing table entries.
  • Select the appropriate mode based on your requirements.

5. Enter Selection Criteria

  • If you want to filter the table entries based on specific criteria, enter the values in the corresponding fields. For instance, to find materials with a specific material group, enter the group in the MATNR field.

6. Execute the Query

  • Click the Execute button to retrieve the table entries based on your selection criteria.

7. Perform Maintenance

  • Depending on the maintenance mode you selected, you can:
    • Display: View the table entries.
    • Change: Edit existing fields by double-clicking on them and entering new values.
    • Create: Add new table entries by entering values in the required fields and clicking Save.
    • Delete: Select the entries you want to delete and click Delete.

8. Save Changes

  • After making your changes, click the Save button to store them in the database.

9. Exit TAANA

  • To exit the transaction, click the Exit button or press Ctrl+F3.

Remember:

  • Always exercise caution when modifying data in SAP. Incorrect changes can have significant consequences.
  • If you're unsure about the implications of your actions, consult with a SAP expert or refer to the system's documentation.

By following these steps, you can effectively use TAANA to maintain data in SAP tables.

Conclusion

Both TAANA and SE16N are essential tools for SAP users. Understanding their differences and knowing when to use each can significantly improve your efficiency and effectiveness in data management and analysis.

entry.title: Re: Issue with concatenate. No blanks at the end. RESPECTING BLANKS not working fully.
entry.content:
Hi @Sandra_Rossi,
I did declare ls_tab like this- DATA: ls_tab TYPE string. 
I also tried it like this ls_tab TYPE c LENGTH 60. And like ls_tab(60).
Non of it made any difference. 

DATA: BEGIN OF ls_low,
        ed_broj TYPE zed_broj-ed_broj,
      END OF ls_low,
      ls_high       LIKE ls_low,
      lt            LIKE TABLE OF ls_low,
      so_ed         TYPE zrtv_ed_broj_range_t,
      ls_ed         TYPE zrtv_ed_broj_range,
      functioncall1 TYPE i,
      brojac1       TYPE i.

DATA : brojac    TYPE n LENGTH 8,
       high      TYPE n LENGTH 8,
       task1(30).

DATA: lt_ed_broj    TYPE TABLE OF zed_broj,
      ls_ed_broj    TYPE          zed_broj,
      lt_ed_broj_pl TYPE TABLE OF zed_broj,
      lt_ed_broj_fl TYPE TABLE OF zed_broj.

DATA: lt_ed_broj_r TYPE TABLE OF zed_broj_r,
      ls_ed_broj_r TYPE zed_broj_r.

DATA: lt_pogoni     TYPE TABLE OF zrtv_pogoni,
      ls_pogoni     TYPE zrtv_pogoni,
      lt_snabdevaci TYPE TABLE OF zrtv_snabdevaci,
      ls_snabdevaci TYPE zrtv_snabdevaci,
      lt_oznaka_ods TYPE TABLE OF zrtv_oznaka_ods,
      ls_oznaka_ods TYPE zrtv_oznaka_ods,
      lv_tabix      TYPE sytabix.

PARAMETERS: pa_per TYPE n LENGTH 7 DEFAULT 100000.

PARAMETERS: amount TYPE bp_betrw_kk DEFAULT 150,
            p_date TYPE sydatum     DEFAULT sy-datum.

PARAMETERS: p_file_o TYPE string.


PERFORM kreiraj_datoteku_zad USING lt_ed_broj_fl ''.



FORM kreiraj_datoteku_zad  USING    pt_ed_broj TYPE ty_zed_broj_t
                                    VALUE(p_pravno_ind).

  DATA: lv_filename  TYPE string,
        ls_tab type c LENGTH 60, "ls_tab(60),
*        ls_tab TYPE STRING,
        lt_tab       LIKE TABLE OF ls_tab,
        lv_row_cnt   TYPE i,
        lv_snabdevac TYPE zrtv_snabdevac,
        ls_ed_broj   TYPE zed_broj,
        lv_empty     type c,
        mmyy(4).


  CONCATENATE p_date+4(2) p_date+2(2) INTO mmyy.

   APPEND VALUE #( oznaka_ods_region = 'NS  '
                  pogon            = '    '
                  ed_broj          = '5005965911               '
                  SIFRA_RAZMENE    = '106000071120             '
                  snabdevac        = '12345' ) TO pt_ed_broj.

    APPEND VALUE #( oznaka_ods_region = 'NS  '
                  pogon            = '    '
                  ed_broj          = '5005965922               '
                  SIFRA_RAZMENE    = '106000072220             '
                  snabdevac        = '12345' ) TO pt_ed_broj.

    APPEND VALUE #( oznaka_ods_region = 'NS  '
                  pogon            = '    '
                  ed_broj          = '5005965933               '
                  SIFRA_RAZMENE    = '106000073320             '
                  snabdevac        = '12345' ) TO pt_ed_broj.

    APPEND VALUE #( oznaka_ods_region = 'NS  '
                  pogon            = '    '
                  ed_broj          = '5005965944               '
                  SIFRA_RAZMENE    = '106000075520             '
                  snabdevac        = '12345' ) TO pt_ed_broj.


  SORT pt_ed_broj BY snabdevac.
  DESCRIBE TABLE pt_ed_broj LINES lv_row_cnt.
  LOOP AT pt_ed_broj INTO ls_ed_broj.
    lv_tabix = sy-tabix.
    IF lv_snabdevac <> ls_ed_broj-snabdevac AND
       lv_tabix GT 1.
      OPEN DATASET lv_filename FOR OUTPUT IN TEXT MODE ENCODING DEFAULT.
      LOOP AT lt_tab INTO ls_tab.
        TRANSFER ls_tab TO lv_filename.
      ENDLOOP.
      CLOSE DATASET lv_filename.
      REFRESH lt_tab.
      IF p_pravno_ind EQ 'X'.
        CONCATENATE p_file_o 'TEST_' ls_ed_broj-snabdevac '_PL_ZADUZENI_' mmyy '.txt'
        INTO lv_filename.
      ELSE.
        CONCATENATE p_file_o 'TEST_' ls_ed_broj-snabdevac '_FL_ZADUZENI_' mmyy '.txt'
        INTO lv_filename.
      ENDIF.

    ELSEIF  lv_tabix = 1.
      IF p_pravno_ind EQ 'X'.
        CONCATENATE p_file_o 'TEST_' ls_ed_broj-snabdevac '_PL_ZADUZENI_' mmyy '.txt'
        INTO lv_filename.
      ELSE.
        CONCATENATE p_file_o 'TEST_' ls_ed_broj-snabdevac '_FL_ZADUZENI_' mmyy '.txt'
        INTO lv_filename.
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.

*    lv_empty = '.'.
    CONCATENATE ls_ed_broj-oznaka_ods_region(4)
                ls_ed_broj-pogon(4)
                ls_ed_broj-ed_broj(25) space space
               ls_ed_broj-SIFRA_RAZMENE(25)  INTO ls_tab RESPECTING BLANKS.
    APPEND ls_tab TO lt_tab.
    lv_snabdevac  = ls_ed_broj-snabdevac.
  ENDLOOP.
  IF lt_tab[] IS NOT INITIAL.


   p_file_o = 'C:\testinv\' && lv_filename.

* TESTING GUI DOWNLOAD
CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_DOWNLOAD'
  EXPORTING

    FILENAME                        = p_file_o
    TRUNC_TRAILING_BLANKS_EOL = abap_false
  TABLES
    DATA_TAB                        = lt_tab
    .
IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
* Implement suitable error handling here
ENDIF.
ENDIF.

*TESTING TRANSFER
IF lt_tab[] IS NOT INITIAL.
    OPEN DATASET lv_filename FOR OUTPUT IN TEXT MODE ENCODING DEFAULT.
    LOOP AT lt_tab INTO ls_tab.
      TRANSFER ls_tab TO lv_filename.
    ENDLOOP.
    CLOSE DATASET lv_filename.
    REFRESH lt_tab.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

Here is my complete testing program. GUI_DOWNLOAD is now working properly, but TRANSFER part is not. It creates .txt document that I can see in AL11:

But when I try to save it on local PC, there are no blanks at the end of rows. 
Thanks again for the effort. If you have any new suggestions, I would really appreciate it. 

BR.

entry.title: Re: SAP Adobe Forms - Question mark field
entry.content: You could check OSS note 2431785 to see if it's relevant.

entry.title: Re: Issue with Dynamic Table Access for Copying MOLGA Content Between Tables
entry.content:
Hi,

The field symbol to which the data is selected is not assigned to any internal table.

" Select data from source country
  SELECT * FROM (pv_tabname) INTO TABLE <lt_src_data> WHERE country = pv_src_ctry.

  1. An instance of an internal table has to be created dynamically for the name of the DB table the selection will be done for.
  2. Field symbol should be assigned to the instance of the internal table.
  3. Selection can be done from the DB into the field symbol (therefore into the instance of the internal table).

Kind regards,
Mateusz

entry.title: How to add fetch multiple lines of record from a CDS view in a BADI and show it in adobe form
entry.content: In SAP Public cloud, I want to fetch multiple lines of record from a CDS VIEW inside a BADI and then show those values in a table inside adobe form. The problem is, the BADI executes only once, and I am able to fetch only one record at a time and show it in the adobe form, what I need is to fetch multiple records at once and display them all in the adobe form template

entry.title: Understanding on Resource Capacity SAP Business One

Need to understanding on  Resource Capacity SAP Business One.

How Daily Capacity Factors works? 

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Re: Error activating Business Content Sales Analysis in S...

Version 1.2.1 was released, which is supposed to fix the error.

But unfortunately, we are now seeing an other error:
"Couldn't import object 'SAP_GEN_HL_DateGridText [SAP_CONTENT\SAP_GEN_HL_DateGridText]' : statusNotAcceptedForRepoHttpClient: Status 500 is not accepted: tempItem.indexOf is not a function"

Does 1.2.1 work for you?

entry.title: Re: How to allow an empty string with check condition in xml transformation?
entry.content:
s-check applies only to Serialization. You are currently Deserializing (SOURCE XML).

NB: don't confuse space (one space) and empty string (zero space).

entry.title: Compare a Date value with Today's date and output a text value in success factors
entry.content:
Hi all,

Probably a very simple question (I've literally had 4 hours experience in success factors reporting - don't ask)

I need to create a calculated column to compare a Date value with Today's date and output text values.
If Date < Today Then "Past Date"  Else "Current or Future Date"

Really basic stuff yet I can't suss it out  😞

I have to say even BOBJ Reporter back in 2000 was a million times better than SF reporting - it really is dire.

entry.title: Re: Unable to connect new CF accounts to cloud connector

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello Dear,

My career commenced in 2017 with a one-month internship, following which I graduated in 2018.

In 2019, I pursued a course in SAP Production Planning (PP) and subsequently took on various roles within the ERP domain. In 2020, I was offered a position as an ERP System Specialist with a Company, where I initially worked with Microsoft Dynamics AX. After a year, the company undertook an upgrade to SAP S/4HANA, marking the beginning of my journey with SAP.

In my initial role as an Application Support Specialist, I gained valuable experience with the logistics cycle, including the MM, PP, and QM modules, and resolved numerous issues. This experience significantly deepened my expertise in the PP and QM modules.

After 1.5 years, I transitioned to a new role as a PP and QM Consultant with Another Company , where I expanded my knowledge further and participated in a comprehensive End-to-End (E2E) implementation.

To further enhance my skills and credentials, I am seeking certification in SAP Quality Management (QM) and would greatly appreciate your support in this endeavor.

entry.title: Re: 2024 Early Fall Stammtisch @ Legacy Hall
Re: 2024 Early Fall Stammtisch @ Legacy Hall
entry.content: thank you to all who attended and shared their stories at the Legacy Hall, early fall stammtisch. Topics discussed: Fiori apps, BTP services, Event Mesh, IBP, CAP & RAP...   our thinking heads started talking about 2025 events already and plan to have a code jam, an inside track early next year after the SAP events this fall.

entry.title: Importing Scope from the Digital Discovery Assessment into SAP Central Business Configuration
entry.content:
Are you leveraging the digital discovery assessment toolkit for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition? If so, you'll be pleased to know that you can seamlessly import your scope selection from there into SAP Central Business Configuration with just a few clicks. This integration between the two tools has been available for several releases now, providing greater convenience and efficiency for users.

Screenshot of the Select Country/Region dialog featuring the Import Scope from JSON File button

Once you’ve completed your scope selection in the digital discovery assessment, the next step is to export it as a JSON file. This file can then be easily imported into SAP Central Business Configuration when defining your scope. The JSON file must be maintained in a specific format, which is automatically generated when exporting from the digital discovery assessment. For use cases going beyond that, a sample JSON file can be downloaded from SAP Central Business Configuration. This file can be manually adjusted as needed and be used as a template.

Screenshot of the Import Scope from JSON File dialog including the button to download a sample file

Upon import, a dialog will notify you of the success of the import and whether any imported scope requires your attention. It's important to note that the import process does not impact any previous scope selections made within SAP Central Business Configuration.

Screenshot of the Warning dialog pointing to imported scenarios that need special attention

To learn more, you can go to this SAP Help Portal page for step-by-step instructions and further details about this topic. And to stay in the know, make sure to follow the SAP Central Business Configuration tag. Or follow this dedicated blog collection to stay up to date with the latest blog posts.

Do you have an idea on how to further enhance SAP Central Business Configuration? Go to the SAP Customer Influence portal to submit an improvement request or vote for the ideas of others. This helps us understand your requirements even better and prioritize our work accordingly. We’re looking forward to your improvement requests.

Preethi

entry.title: Using Fiori 8D problem solving for defect created in S/4 Hana using SAP QM
entry.content:
Hello
I've just completed a migration from ECC to S/4 Hana. My QM manager need to manage a 8D report on Defects created in S/4 Hana with QM01 tarnsaction or similar. I know which Porblem solving 8M metodology is available only in FIORI using APP F2929. I can manage 8D procedure only for defects created directly in FIORI using Create defect Tile, but I'm not able to Process defects previously created on S/4 QM environment (QM01 or similar). Someone can suggest to me a solution ? Is it possible manage  8D Metodolgy in Fiori for defects created in S/4 QM too ?
Thank-you in advance for your help
Claudio

entry.title: GTS tables related to currencies fr instance TCURF
entry.content:
I noticed that there are differences in the TCURF table between GTS and ECC GTS tables related to currencies for instance  TCURF,

Question I have is the following: Is there a need to bring the currencies related tables up to date with identical entries in the ECC and GTS systems?

entry.title: Re: Padding is invalid and cannot be removed
entry.content: And did you impliment the suggested work arounds on that post?

entry.title: Re: Required Learning on New Learning Home Experience
entry.content:
Hi Wayne,

Regarding the change of a label content, it is (almost) always possible - read here for the general explanation: https://me.sap.com/notes/2120336/E.

Bear in mind though that the same label may appear on different screens - possibly in different contexts.

Changing the value of the label should be exectuded with caution and always keep a backup of the original label value, should you need to revert to it.

For "Required Learning", search label id label.RequiredAssignments

KR, Frederic

entry.title: Re: One item and classes with different durations?
entry.content:
Hi @Guido,

The item duration can be adjusted at the subsequent class level by adjusting the class segments themselves.

I suggest you download our SAP SuccessFactors HCM Training Materials Guide from the Digital Library at https://dam.sap.com/mac/app/p/pdf/asset/preview/MqoPXdx?ltr=a&rc=10

And use p179 of Admin Help at https://help.sap.com/doc/844cba6db4b0477e92867df6c24a2109/2405/en-US/SF_Admin_Help_en.pdf

If a class presents a different duration that the "default" duration at the item level, it will reflect in the library view when displaying the various available classes.

Hope that helps

KR, Frederic

entry.title: sap BTP MDK deployee the changes every time i am getting the Failed to initialize application data

entry.title: Re: Z1 ledger and accounting principle related issue whil...
entry.content:
Hello, The ledgers to be posted by CKMLCP are defined by ledgere group ''Ledger Group Settlement (FI)'' 'in V_FCML_MLCO_COFI.

For the depreciation run, you have to define accounting principles that are in agreement with your asset accounting configuration. In this case you define accouting principle ZMLP in the COGM configuration but this accouting principle is not used in asset accouting, causing conflicts when executing AFAB.

entry.title: Re: SAP Slipstream Engine: Keyboard opens automatically i...
entry.content: It depends on transaction. You create onload script, identify the object like in transaction IH08 and put this in script session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/box%B010002_BLOCK_1000").setFocus(); (then you attach this script in OnLoad event)

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration for data services - Product Positioning and Direction
entry.content:
From note 3494037: 

  • September 2024
    • SAP launches the Tenant Migration Guide on the SAP Help Portal
    •  
    • Where is the guide?

entry.title: Re: SAC - Blending Support in Optimized Design Mode, BW l...
entry.content:
We support Blended Charts with the available release in the Optimized Experience. For Blended Tables it is tentatively planned for the 2025 Q1 QRC (subject to change by SAP at any point in time). It is best to continue to monitor the Roadmap Explorer to see the latest updates and exact timelines.

For Blended Visualizations, we've added a more guided experience to ensure that customers are not creating a Blended Visualization without realizing OR assume there are in a blended state. It means there are two rules:

  1. Users must use at least one entity from each data model that is added to the Builder Panel. It could be a measure or dimension and can be satisfied via binding it to the visualization, adding a filter, and so on
  2. Users must have a least one linked dimension within the visualization.

entry.title: Re: Directly call create object page or RAP action from Tile
entry.content: Thanks Mio for your reply. But that means I have to create 2 apps, 1 for general display and other for create.

entry.title: Where can I learn to to streamline and automate bank statement processing?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Discovering Bank Statement Processing and Account Clearing in SAP S/4HANA learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey empowers business users and consultants to streamline and automate bank statement processing. In doing so, they will be able to boost efficiency in the finance sector and effectively utilize the capabilities of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Learning Objectives

  • Describe cash collection and reconciliation​
  • Define how cash is applied in the system​
  • Describe the Multi-Bank Connectivity option
  • Monitor the status of bank statements
  • Describe configured posting rules​
  • Describe automated posting rules​
  • Reprocess bank statements​
  • Receivables line-item matching​
  • Payables line-item matching​

 

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge.

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud - CDS Development - Eclipse
entry.content: Prasanth, Thank you for the link. It has so much information and the simple answers I am looking for may be somehwre in the document. I have built the CDS and using Service Binding as OData V2 - API I am able to see the data. But I am looking to find ways whether there are any simple options and get to what I am looking for. Any specific answer to those pointed questions woul dhelp very much.

entry.title: Re: Query report of Bin location and Batch SAP Business One
entry.content:
Try the below query, Replace or Remove the item code as required.

Select x."ItemCode", x."BatchID", x."BatchNumber", x."ExpDate", x."BinLocation", x."Qty"
From(
Select a."ItemCode", a."SnBMDAbs" as "BatchID", c."DistNumber" as "BatchNumber", c."ExpDate", b."BinCode" as "BinLocation",
Sum(a."OnHandQty") as "Qty"
From OBBQ a
Inner Join OBIN b on b."AbsEntry" = a."BinAbs"
Inner Join OBTN c on c."AbsEntry" = a."SnBMDAbs" AND a."ItemCode" = c."ItemCode"
Where a."ItemCode" = '10001'
Group By a."ItemCode", a."SnBMDAbs", b."BinCode", c."DistNumber", c."ExpDate"
) as X
Where x."Qty" != 0

entry.title: Re: SAP Adobe Forms - Question mark field
entry.content: Thanks for the reply. I already checed this note, i have English translations in the system for those Balance confirmation PDF forms. I cant't understand why those fields are not editable. Maybe the fastest solution is to delete those tables and recreate them from scrach.

entry.title: Re: SAP Slipstream Engine: Keyboard opens automatically i...
entry.content:
Hi,

If the problem is with MENU text field, which has initial focus, then there are several options to try.

  1. Hide or make Menu text field read-only (if you are not using it)
  2. Use script for onAfterRefresh, which will move Focus from text field to its label, for example:
// onAfterRefresh move focus from Menu input to Label
if (session.findById("wnd[0]").systemFocus.id == "wnd[0]/usr/subX:/SCWM/SAPLRF_SSCR_PM:0001/txt/SCWM/S_RF_SCRELM-MENU") {
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/subX:/SCWM/SAPLRF_SSCR_PM:0001/lbl/SCWM/S_RF_SCRELM-MENU").setFocus();
}
You have to check the IDs of Label and Menu text field (especially SAPLRF_SSCR_PM:0001 part), because they can differ on your screens.
You can add some other fields into this logic too.
 
I hope this will work.

Best Regards!

entry.title: Re: Mac/Linux trigger Java GUI Scripting from command line
entry.content:
In case someone comes across this thread and that they're having issues with SAPGUI for Java 7.80:

  • The NOPHANTOM trace appears to be replaced with SCRIPTNOMESSAGE
    • The reason why this works is because setting this trace (as a side effect) puts SAPGUI into "unattended mode"
  • If you rather not use SCRIPTNOMESSAGE (and see unnecessary tracing) then at the beginning of your script you can do the following (undocumented) trick:
    • application.unwrap(application).mUnattended = true;
  • I know there are references in this thread about how the SAPGUI can/will exit after the script completes and elsewhere in the SAPGUI documentation it suggests that closing connections/sessions should shutdown the SAPGUI -- but this has not been my experience. 
    • After closing the connections/sessions and confirming it completed with the SHUTDOWN trace, at the end of my script I now call:
      • java.lang.System.exit(0);
    • NOTE: This will not work with the Java Security policy that is shipped with the SAPGUI.  I had to call the SAPGUI using Java (like the author originally did) and pass in the absolute path for a custom security policy to the JVM at start up:
      • java -Djava.security.policy=file://...
    • The contents of the security policy I used are:
      • grant principal com.sap.platin.micro.GuiPrincipal "SAPGUI:UserScript" {
    permission java.io.FilePermission "<<ALL FILES>>", "read,write,delete,execute";
    permission java.lang.RuntimePermission "getenv.*";
    // Generic Permissions necessary for Scripting
    permission javax.security.auth.AuthPermission "doAsPrivileged";
    permission java.awt.AWTPermission "createRobot";
 
    // Allow the script to exit
    permission java.lang.RuntimePermission "exitVM";
};

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Service Client shows several blank screens.
entry.content:
When dynamic pages are not rendering most likely the problem is invalid metadata.  I would suggest logging the generated metadata and paste into a new blank temp page in the Editor and look for errors.

For your caption issue can you provide more details around that call.  Maybe share the relevant code leading up to that line.

entry.title: SAP at Hackfestival 2024 - Technology & Sustainability Coming Together to Find Innovative Solutions
entry.content:
The Hackfestival 2024 is a highly anticipated tech event that took place in Mannheim between September 6-8. Under the motto “Decarbonize the Planet”, the festival aimed to bring together tech enthusiasts, sustainability experts, coders, and hackers to collaborate and innovate in sustainability related hands-on challenges during a full-weekend hackathon.  

Located at Congress Center Rosengarten, it combined a competitive hackathon and free citizen track with a wide range of engaging activities for the greater public - including an exhibition area, workshops, open discussions and seminars. Participants had the opportunity to network with other tech talents and industry leaders, share their ideas, grow their career, test their skills and learn from each other. 

Apart from that, the event was also a great opportunity to bring citizens closer to sustainability in general as well as individual corporate initiatives. As an event partner, we had many valuable exchanges around SAP’s own journey to net-zero and the SAP Sustainability product portfolio at our booth. It is always meaningful to see the interest in this topic, make a contribution and provide deeper insights into corporate sustainability and thus make it more tangible for a larger audience. 

 

SAP team at our SAP Sustainability booth

Some key facts and figures around the Hackfestival: 

  • Organized by The Hackathon Company – an independent European hackathon-as-a-service provider  
  • 300+ participants 
  • 35+ partners (Google, aws, Roche and more) 
  • 48-hours of hacking 
  • Six sustainability challenges 
  • Price pool of 10.000+ Euros 

 

The event kicked-off on Friday with an opening ceremony and inspiring speech of Alexander Gerst, who talked about his journey as an ESA astronaut followed by Christian Specht, mayor of the city of Mannheim. Gunther Rothermel, co-General Manager and Chief Product Officer for SAP Sustainability, and other industry channel partners were part of a fruitful panel discussion, giving insights about the corporate view on sustainability and how technology and innovation can help take climate action and make a difference in the world.  

Gunther said: “With increasing regulatory landscapes and reporting requirements, our customers have set themselves a broad set of challenging sustainability targets...and we did the same at SAP. There is a lot we can address with software and smart approaches to embed sustainability into digital business processes...First we wanted to start by acting as an exemplar, working on our own emissions and journey to net-zero as a company...in the second step, we help our customers to become more sustainable and accompany them with our SAP Sustainability products. Imagine that SAP customers generate 87% of total global commerce....By integrating sustainability more naturally into customers transactions, we can have a huge impact on decarbonization, reduction of waste and more together. So, both these sides matter to us.”  

The panel talk has clearly shown - at SAP, we incorporate sustainability in our strategy as well as our core values and are proud to have a strong internal SAP Community that engages in voluntary projects and lives sustainability in its daily actions, because every contribution, no matter how small, can make a difference. 

According to this discussion, the focus of our sustainability effort is based on four key areas:  

  • Taking Climate Action and Reducing Carbon Emissions 
  • Establishing a Circular Economy to reuse material and avoid waste 
  • Integrating a Social Responsibility dimension  
  • Holistic Steering & Reporting: Acting on the operational layer to be compliant and safe on the production and plant level as well as in company's own transactions and processes to be transparent on the way to net-zero. 

Sustainability @SAP

Afterwards the different challenges were introduced and kicked off by the companies. The highly motivated participants had 48 hours to solve challenges provided by the “Challenge Setters” under the main topic “Decarbonize the Planet”. Divided into teams they started working on sustainability solutions, including design and business perspectives.  

The SAP teams: The 48-hour hackathon has started

 

SAP' challenge: „𝐇𝐞𝐲, 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐞’𝐬 𝐜𝐚𝐫𝐛𝐨𝐧 𝐢𝐧 𝐦𝐲 𝐥𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐡🍴”: 

We provided the following task: “As one-third of global emissions stem from the food system, imagine the impact that can be made by addressing this challenge head-on – especially when there’s the catering needs of over 110,000 employees. ​The challenge for the participants is to develop a digital solution that helps decarbonize the planet by reducing emissions within the food system or specifically targeting food waste.” 

 

Heads were put together, many innovative ideas were developed and there were no limits to creativity. In the end, we received a lot of valuable ideas, and the following team was among the winners:  

SAP challenge team: "FrostGuardians": Food waste comes from the fact that everyone wastes food every day, so with the help of AI and a camera, the team developed a fridge that manages what's in the fridge, gives tips on food that goes with a recipe and is connected to a shopping list. 

SAP team and our winners

Big congratulations to the team and all other winners for the inspiring and creative solutions. 🏅

The proud winners of the SAP challenge: FrostGuardians

 

One of the main goals of the festival was to foster creativity and problem-solving skills among participants and to encourage people to develop solutions with a positive social impact. Many attendees left the festival feeling inspired and motivated to continue their work in the tech industry. 

The Hackfestival 2024 in Mannheim was a fantastic opportunity for tech enthusiasts to come together and push the boundaries of innovation. It provided a platform where like-minded individuals could collaborate and drive positive change. 

It was a pleasure to support this event as a partner. A hackathon is a great opportunity to access collective knowledge, promote creativity and team spirit, resulting in digital applications and innovative ideas that sometimes can even be the start of something big. 

There is only one thing left to say - A big thank you goes to the organizational team and all participants. Only together we can make a difference. 🌍 🌱

 

Please see the full list of all other winners' solutions (shared by Oliver Bruemmer, Founder & CEO The Hackathon Company):
 
Trash Buddy by Stadt Mannheim/ Metropolregion Rhein-Neckar: Scan products you want to throw away and get tips on what you can do with them. Find other solutions and don’t only throw it away. 
 
Mannheim Green City Quest by Stadt Mannheim/ Metropolregion Rhein-Neckar: Playful knowledge transfer app that encourages young people to try out new ways of thinking and exploring the city in a sustainable way with geolocations and gamification elements. 
 
Rochy - The Carbon Coach by Roche : "Rochy" gives sustainability reminders and awards points when fulfilled and proven with pictures, e.g. plate eaten empty. Collected points lead to coupons or can be donated.  
Carbon Crasher by Schwarz IT KG: Machine learning app that recommends products based on your interests, such as products that save CO2 or have a short expiration date, with special prices, coupons and gamification. 
 
KAEFER by KION Group: Efficient LLM model with key features: dynamic scoring of models, prompt model complexity matching, ML-based prompt categorization, self-learning architecture interaction.

Learn more about SAP Sustainability and subscribe to weekly Sustainability Highlight Newsletter.

entry.title: Re: SAP Adobe Forms - Question mark field
entry.content: Yes, deleting the fields and recreating them is the quickest alternative, and I tested it out in our dev system because we have the same display on our version (S4 2020).

entry.title: Re: sap BTP MDK deployee the changes every time i am gett...

entry.title: Re: Planned order not consuming inventory
entry.content:
Hello

You are using a make-to-order planning strategy/requirement type, therefore, system won't consider existing stock and it will always generate a new planned order.

I suggest you to use a make-to-stock planning strategy (like 40) and then try with a new CIR.

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: Venda de Serviço com ISS retido - erro ao salvar a ordem de venda - condição BX63
entry.content: Link has been updated

entry.title: Re: sap BTP MDK deployee the changes every time i am gett...
entry.content: Will you plz share the images it would be better to understand

entry.title: Re: Estorno - ERRO Qtd.EF
entry.content:
Hello.

Here we are dealing with this error in an order that had an invoice linked to it issued in the previous month, and since the period was already closed, this generated the error. The quantity in free use did not exist because the control lot had been reversed, but since the invoice was not reversed, the system prevented the processing from continuing with this error message. Please check if there is an invoice in a previous period and if it is possible to reverse it before continuing with this reversal process using movement 102.

Adilson

 

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Olá. 

Aqui tratamos esse erro num pedido que tinha a nota fiscal atrelada a ele lançada no mes anterior, e , como o periodo já estava fechado, isso gerava o erro. A quantidade em livre utilização não existia pois, o lote de controle fora estornado, mas, como não estornaram a nota fiscal, o sistema impedia com essa mensagem de erro que o processamento seguisse. Por favor, verifique se existe nota fiscal em periodo anterior e se é possivel estorna-la antes de seguir com esse processo de estorno usando o movimento 102.

Adilson

entry.title: Re: sap BTP MDK deployee the changes every time i am gett...
entry.content:
Hi @tirumala 

There are 2 ways to troubleshoot and find the root cause.

1. Firstly, You can check the logs in the mobile services cockpit, reference screenshot below. This will give some idea as to why the initialization is failing.

2. In the backend, you can check IWFND/ERROR_LOG or IWBEP/ERROR_LOG.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: SAC - Scale percentage in the model
entry.content:
Hi All,

in my analytic model can I set the scale "percentage" for a measure?

For example I have this calculation in the model , but I don't find the way to set as percentageeee:

the only way I've found is:

1. Create a formula in the story that links to this measure

2. Formatting this formula in the settings

I'd like to avoid to create a formula, but I don't understand if I nee to do something in the model or in the story.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: New MDG implementation for supplier module - Restrict...
entry.content:
Hi @studencp Agree, i would like to confirm if its some configuration enabling as the trace doesn't check for any authorization groups (see attached). I would prefer to check configuration before performing any custom coding. 

 

SAP MDG security guide says "B_BUPA_GRP - This authorization object is optional. You need to assign this
authorization object only if master data records are to be specifically protected.". 

 

Additionally, it says "If you want to restrict the authorizations for users or roles to specific values, go to Create Authorizations for Data Model and define which entity types and attributes are authorization
relevant." - Did anyone perform this?

entry.title: Where can I find the change number used in MM12 transaction?
entry.content: I ran tcode MM12, entering a material and change number.  I made a change to the x-plant material status.  In tcode MM14 I can see the pending change, but how do I find the change number that I used?  MM14 does not show that.

entry.title: Are functional locations required in EAM
entry.content:
I understand the concept of Functional Location in EAM. However I dont know that I see the need. Are they required?

I could just as easly create the Tech Object for equipment and assign tasks to it with materials required in each operation.

I dont know that I see the need to create maintenance order against a funtional location.

Margit

entry.title: Re: Switch on gCTS (for existing packages)
entry.content: Thank You for the clarification, @Karin

entry.title: Re: What is the best practice for storing attachment file...
entry.content:
Hello @beampakorn 

Storage of attachment in database tables is in my opinion best practices. It can pass if attachments are really slow. Otherwise you are stuffing the database with large objects that don't need to be accessed very quickly. That is waste of DB space. Instead a dedicated content server should be used e.g. SAP Content Server

Attachments can then be stored and access with ArchiveLink interface.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP condição de pagamento - lançar valores parcelas / fixos
entry.content: I understand that this subject is old, but it was possible to apply this adjustment in Brazil?

entry.title: Re: Future of Electronic Bank Statement Processing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud - Release of 4X8
entry.content:
Hi @Edrilan_Berisha .

That's good news. Although I'm wondering if one can still influence posting area 1 w/o the posting rules? Processing rules are just for posting area 2, right? And especially when we come to the integration with FI-CA, we often just have something like BANK to TECH, aggregated for one transaction code, w/o using posting area 2, because the magic happens in Contract Accounting then.

BR, Sascha

entry.title: Over time calculation for Different WS hours in a same Time Recording Profile
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I've a requirement below to calculate overtime for 2 employees belongs to same TRP but having different WS.

There's a time profile let's say TRP_01

2 users are part of this TRP but, both the users have 2 different work schedules example user X has 40 hours of WS and User Y has 48 hours of work schedules. 

Now, the requirement is - When the user Y records hours above 48 hours it should tag as Overtime under Time Valuation result, 

Where as for user X, anything above 40 hours should tag as Overtime Time Valuation result. Is this possible achieving? If no, then what can be the workaround for this issue?

Best Regards,

Somashree

City: Wroclaw, Poland

I'm not sure how to fix this problem. Can you please help?

Thanks

Babu

entry.title: Missing Adaptation after Deployment to Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Hello, I am adapting an the Standard Manage Purchase Orders App. My adaption works and can be seen when  using App preview in BAS (Business Application Studio).

I have deployed the app with out a problem in using deployment. Given the manifest below

{
  "fileName": "manifest",
  "layer": "CUSTOMER_BASE",
  "fileType": "appdescr_variant",
  "reference": "ui.ssuite.s2p.mm.pur.po.manage.st.s1",
  "id": "customer.very.demure",
  "namespace": "apps/ui.ssuite.s2p.mm.pur.po.manage.st.s1/appVariants/customer.very.demure/",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "content": [
    {
    "changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
    "content": {
        "modelId": "i18n"
    },
    "texts": {
        "i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties"
    }
},
    {
    "changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
    "content": {
        "modelId": "@i18n"
    },
    "texts": {
        "i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties"
    }
},
    {
    "changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
    "content": {
        "modelId": "i18n|sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ListReport|C_PurchaseOrderTP"
    },
    "texts": {
        "i18n": "i18n/ListReport/C_PurchaseOrderTP/i18n.properties"
    }
},
    {
    "changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
    "content": {
        "modelId": "i18n|sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage|C_PurchaseOrderTP"
    },
    "texts": {
        "i18n": "i18n/ObjectPage/C_PurchaseOrderTP/i18n.properties"
    }
},
    {
    "changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
    "content": {
        "modelId": "i18n|sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage|C_PurchaseOrderItemTP"
    },
    "texts": {
        "i18n": "i18n/ObjectPage/C_PurchaseOrderItemTP/i18n.properties"
    }
},
    {
    "changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
    "content": {
        "modelId": "i18n|sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage|C_PurchaseOrderLimitItemTP"
    },
    "texts": {
        "i18n": "i18n/ObjectPage/C_PurchaseOrderLimitItemTP/i18n.properties"
    }
},
    {
    "changeType": "appdescr_ui5_setMinUI5Version",
    "content": {
        "minUI5Version": "1.114.9"
    }
},
    {
      "changeType": "appdescr_app_setTitle",
      "content": {},
      "texts": {
        "i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties"
      }
    }
  ]
}
After deploy the next step requires Target mapping configuration. 
How do I configure the target mapping to ensure that the Variant App shows up on screen and the Adaptation is also there.
Currently the Adaptation part doesn't show up

 



Thank you for your answers Experts

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Trial Account Creation and Enabling Integration Suite service(SAP CPI)
entry.content:
Hi All , 

If any one is still  still experiencing unauthorised access to the Integration Suite, Try to open it in a different browser .

Thanks

Rishabh

entry.title: Re: Erro de atribuição: nenhuma linha encontrada na tabel...
entry.content:
Essa tabela interna IT_NFE_IMPOSTO_ICMS é responsável por receber e mapear os valores de ICMS e ICMS ST para o bloco de ICMS no XML. Será preciso revisar a nota fiscal e verificar se existe algum item que esteja faltando informação de ICMS, na minha análise eu identifiquei que o item 59 da nota que estava com esse problema não tem informação de ICMS.

Nota fiscal na Etapa 8



NF com Erro de atribuição: nenhuma linha encontrada na tabela IT_NFE_IMPOSTO_ICMS


Item que está faltando a informação de imposto de ICMS, item 59, nesse item só tem informação de IPI.

Nesse caso será preciso revisar os itens da NF e verificar se existe mais itens faltando a informação do ICMS. Depois de ajustar a NF é só fazer o procedimento de Reenviar.

Atenciosamente
André Tavares Maris

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration for data services - Product Positioning and Direction
entry.content: Tenant migration guide is planned to be published by end of september , As mentioned in SAP Note 3494037, please note that planned schedules are subject to change.

entry.title: New CQC SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding Transition
entry.content:
As part of the Enterprise Support Cloud Edition offering, we’re excited to announce the launch of a new Continuous Quality Check (CQC) SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding Transition focused on assisting you in transitioning from SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 1.0 to SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding. The new service will be live  and available to SAP customers on September 16th. 

The CQC SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding Transition is designed to provide a comprehensive evaluation of the transition process from Onboarding 1.0 to Onboarding. 

Benefits of this service:

  • The benefits of this service include:
  • Review current settings, use of features, and enablement of key functions.
  • Analyze effort required for the transition.
  • Receive a detailed service report that highlights effort required and key areas for consideration not only for current enabled features but also for not enabled features and features only available in new Onboarding version.
  • Optimize the possibility for a smooth transition journey.

Please check the CQC SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding Transition infosheet in SAP Support Portal Page to learn about the key features and benefits of this service, when to use it (or not) and further details of the delivery.

How to request the service:

Remote Services can be requested via the Get Support application in SAP for Me (SAP Note 1296527). When submitting your request, please select:

  • Product: “Continuous Quality Check & Improvement Services”
  • Product function: “Service request for a Cloud Solution”

If you need assistance in submitting your case, you may contact your local Customer Interaction Center (CIC).

Further Support and Empowerment via SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps

Value Maps are a support and empowerment program from SAP Enterprise Support and are available to you via the SAP Learning Hub. A one-time sign in with your S User is required, and everything thereafter is free as part of your entitlements. We provide:

  • Prescriptive Guidance
  • Empowerment
  • Social Collaboration
  • Expert Access

Check out the SAP Enterprise Support value maps landing page  for more and start engaging today!

entry.title: Re: Integrate SAP Quality Issue Resolution Custom Methodologies in S/4HANA Private Cloud or On-premi
entry.content: Nice Blog and much waited solution.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano

 

my name is ahmed wael sap basis consultant and I'm excited to be part of the SAP Community Beginner Corner! I work for an organization called Edraky,
which is focused on providing comprehensive SAP training and implementation services to businesses across the Middle East. I'm writing to apply for certification  Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public EditionC_S4CPB.

entry.title: Re: How to record the class not to delete the item from t...
entry.content:
Hi Dominika,

What you described is the expected design and behaviour of our solution.

A class is a scheduled "materialisation" of an item.

When the class is attended, the completion is recorded against the item itself (not its class).

Meaning that when the item is completed, it disappears from the learning plan and moves to the learning history.

If you wish/need to have two autumn/spring class sessions, the system will require two instructor-led items, from which scheduling respective classes will be possible. KR, Frederic

entry.title: Re: How to book a room when creating a class in SAP LMS?
entry.content:
Good day @lilymar,

Currently, our LMS does not have a productized integration with Exchange/Outlook to support the scenario that you describe.

It is possible though to import the full list of rooms in the LMS, so they serve as references, are available resources when classes are scheduled, and are inserted in email/vCal notifications sent to the participant.

KR, Frederic

entry.title: Re: PickList difference with b1 client with Service Layer
entry.content: Hello, I am facing same issue you described above and cannot find the solution to update a Pick List document using POST and PATCH. The document gets updated but seems to be broken after update. Were you able to find any solution for this issue? Thanks and regards, Gabriel

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I identify as a person in the below categories:

    • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
    • People looking to switch their careers mid-life
    • I want to upskill myself in SAP technology and to study SAP rigorously and get a job opportunity soon.I'm eager to take a free certification attempt because I believe it will help me learn more and become even better at what I do. I know that the world of technology is always changing, and I want to stay up-to-date with the latest advancements.I am grateful for this opportunity and excited about the possibilities ahead. Thank you for considering my application for the free certification attempt.

entry.title: Re: How and when to truncate log file in database mirroring setup (SQL Anywhere 17.0.11.7458)
entry.content:
AFAIK, you simply cannot truncate the current log in a HA setup because the mirror relies on that - see here.

Instead, you can rename the log, and lateron delete the renamed log, and the log backup on the mirror will be deleted, too.

entry.title: RETURN PURCHASE ORDER
entry.content:
Hi

 

I would like to know if there is a way to delete or archive a return purchase order that was partially dispatched.  Some item lines were deleted and the rest was dispatched.  Now it lies on my open RPO report.

 

Regards

entry.title: Re: Date format validation in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: Hi Bala,

entry.title: Re: Custom mapping task LTMOM
entry.content:
Hello,

please use the migration object modeler (transaction LTMOM) to achieve, what you need. You can create an own rule and assign a translation object (own, if needed) and assign this to your field, which you want to map in the mapping task functionality of the SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit. Please check the deep-dive-slides for the migration object modeler chapter 2.4. rules & translation objects (slide 80ff). There you also find an example how to create an own rule.

You find all training-materials for the SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit on our central landing page in the section Learning -> Training material.

I hope this helps you to create your own rule and translation object.

Best regards, Kirstin

entry.title: Action precheck doesn't flag the fields on the screen (Fiori Elements w/ RAP service)
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to implement a precheck on my Behavior Def. to prevent an action from getting fired before a certain condition is met.

BehDef. - precheck for GetQuotes action

Beh. Imp. - I'm filling the reported and failed tables with the fields that have failed to meet the condition (ie. Terminal, CounterParty, ContractDateTime) 

The $batch request response sent from the S/4HANA system when this validation error occurs is the following:

 

{"error":{"code":"SABP_BEHV/100","message":{"lang":"en","value":"Please fill all mandatory fields to get quotes"},"innererror":{"application":{"component_id":"","service_namespace":"/SAP/","service_id":"xxxxx","service_version":"0001"},"transactionid":"F147E0AD61C60120E0066DF79D7FC785","timestamp":"","Error_Resolution":{"SAP_Transaction":"","SAP_Note":"See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (
https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)","Batch_SAP_Note":"See
SAP Note 1869434 for details about working with $batch (
https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1869434)"},"errordetails":[{"ContentID":"id-1726152164082-309","code":"SABP_BEHV/100","message":"Please
fill all mandatory fields to get quotes","propertyref":"","severity":"error","transition":true,"target":"ContractDatetime","additionalTargets":["Counterparty","Terminal"]}]}}}

 

 There we can see the targets were mapped correctly: "..."target":"ContractDatetime","additionalTargets":["Counterparty","Terminal"

I'm expecting this to be enough for the Fiori Elements framework to interpret the error content and flag the target fields on the screen but it doesn't happen. Instead, it just shows a message on a popup.

Is there any other way to flag the wrong fields on the screen?

entry.title: Re: ABAP class/FM/BAPI/IDOC to create/maintain Inbound De...
entry.content: So far, I have found that FM: /SCWM/INB_DLV_SAVEREPLICA which internally uses ABAP Class: "/scwm/cl_mapin_id_savereplica" (this same class is used in idoc which would create inbound delivery) to create delivery in EWM. However, if I try to use this class or FM directly in my ABAP report, it would throw exception "/SCWM/CX_TM_USAGE". The ST22 runtime long text says, "PROG/ Z_TEST_CREATE_IBDLV is not an external interface; contact administrator". On investigating further, I found out that this class would validate a few things like checking if the program type is RFC or IDOC. If it is a regular ABAP program of type "PROG" it will raise this exception. I am trying to call the function in qRFC and see whether that works.

entry.title: Blofin_ referral code:Cq3WDI (Claim 2024 Latest Bonus)
entry.content: The caffeine in coffee helps people compensate for sleepiness and improve school or work
